translations.### 完整 Github Repo 如下\n\n: ### The complete Github Repo is as follows
translations.### 自行實現 iOS NSAttributedString HTML Ren: ### Implementing iOS NSAttributedString HTML Render by Yourself
translations.#### 一些 Tag Parser & AttributedStringSty: #### Some Examples of Tag Parser & AttributedStringStyle Implementation
translations.#### 補充. 渲染複雜的 HTML — 想製作文饒圖效果\n\n: #### Supplement. Rendering Complex HTML — Creating Text with Rich Graphic Effects
translations.**有渲染約束：可自行撰寫 HTML Parser & Render**\n: **With rendering constraints: You can write your own HTML Parser & Render**
translations.**渲染約束** 的意思是限定 App 端能支援的渲染格式，例如只支援 **粗體: **Rendering constraints** means limiting the rendering formats supported by the app, such as only supporting **bold**, italic, and [hyperlinks](https://zhgchg.li){:target="_blank"}.
translations.*有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li: *If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.*
translations.*本文同步發表於個人 Blog： [**[點我前往]**](../a8c2d26: *This article is also published on my personal blog: [**[Click here]**](../a8c2d26cc734/) .*
translations.- Confirming the scope of requirements\n:
- Confirming the scope of requirements

- Confirm Supported Specifications

- Confirm interface specifications (Markdown/BBCode/... can continue to use HTML, but it must be constrained, for example only `<b>/<i>/<a>/<u>`, and the program must **explicitly inform** developers)

- Implementing Your Own Rendering Mechanism

- Maintenance and Iteration Support Specifications
translations.- Support Extensible Tags for Parsing\n\:
- Support Extensible Tags for Parsing

- Support setting Tag Default Style e.g. apply link style to <a> Tag

- Support parsing `style` attributes, since HTML explicitly specifies display styles like `style="color:red"`

- Style support includes changing text weight, size, underline, line spacing, letter spacing, background color, and text color

- Does not support complex tags such as Image Tag, Table Tag, etc.
translations.- The advantage is that it also converts:
- The advantage is that it also converts HTML Entities to actual characters, e.g. `g -> g` - The advantage is achieving complexity; if the HTML is non-compliant, XMLParser will fail, e.g. `
` forgot to write as `
`.
translations.- The simplest and most effective way\n\:
- The simplest and most effective way - Regex cannot guarantee complete accuracy. For example, `

Paragraph

` is valid HTML but will be stripped incorrectly.
translations.- This is a known iOS Foundation bug: it:
- This is a known iOS Foundation bug: it has existed since iOS 12.

- For rendering complex HTML without usage constraints: please use WKWebView

- **With rendering constraints: You can write your own HTML Parser & Render**

- Directly use Markdown as rendering constraints: iOS ≥ 15 NSAttributedString can [render text directly using Markdown format](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/foundation/nsattributedstring/3796598-init){:target="_blank"}
translations.- Using NSAttributedString to render HTM:
- Using NSAttributedString to render HTML and then extracting the string will give you a clean String.

- The same issues as in this chapter: iOS 15 easily crashes, has poor performance, and can only operate on the Main Thread.
translations.> **Rendering constraints** means limiti: > **Rendering constraints** means limiting the rendering formats supported by the app, such as only supporting **bold**, italic, and [hyperlinks](https://zhgchg.li){:target="_blank"}.

translations.> Even if you are using iOS < 15, which: > Even if you are using iOS < 15, which does not support native Markdown, you can still find [an expert-made Markdown Parser solution](https://github.com/chockenberry/MarkdownAttributedString){:target="_blank"} on Github.
translations.> I personally think that simply strippi: > I personally think that simply stripping HTML **Option 2. is a better approach**. I'm introducing this method because rendering HTML uses the same principle, so let's start with this as a simple example :)

translations.> To quote a former boss: \"This is just: > To quote a former boss: "This is just too crazy, right?"
translations.> You can reduce features according to y: > You can reduce features according to your own specification needs. For example, if background color adjustment is not required, you don't need to provide an option to set the background color.
translations.NSAttributedString 在 init 時發生 `Crashed:: NSAttributedString crashes with `Crashed: com.apple.main-thread EXC_BREAKPOINT 0x00000001de9d4e44` during init.
translations.Regex 並不能保證完全正確 e.g `<p foo=\">now what?:
Regex cannot guarantee complete accuracy. For example, `

Paragraph

` is valid HTML but will be stripped incorrectly.
translations.UITextView 做文饒圖的坑，可參考我之前的文章： [iOS UIText: Pitfalls of UITextView for text wrapping can be referred to in my previous article: [iOS UITextView 文繞圖編輯器 (Swift)](../e37d66ea1146/)
translations.`<br>` / `<Congratulation!>` / `<b>Bold<:
`
` / `` / `BoldBold+ItalicItalic` These three possible cases will cause XMLParser to fail parsing and throw an error, resulting in a blank display. When using XMLParser, the HTML string must fully comply with XML rules and cannot tolerate errors like a browser or NSAttributedString.DocumentType.html does.
translations.```\n- 第 5 到第 7 字元要標示為 程式碼 (用`Text`格式包裝):
```
- Characters 5 to 7 should be marked as code (wrapped with `Text` format)
- Characters 18 to 22 should be marked as a link (wrapped with [Text](URL) format)
- Characters 50 to 63 should be marked as bold (wrapped with *Text* format)
- Characters 55 to 69 should be marked as italic (wrapped with _Text_ format)
```
translations.```swift\nhtmlString = \"<div>Test</div>:
```swift htmlString = "
Test
" htmlString.replacingOccurrences(of: "<[^>]+>", with: "", options: .regularExpression, range: nil) ```
translations.```swift\nlet data = \"<div>Text</div>\":
```swift let data = "
Text
".data(using: .unicode)! let attributed = try NSAttributedString(data: data, options: [.documentType: NSAttributedString.DocumentType.html, .characterEncoding: String.Encoding.utf8.rawValue], documentAttributes: nil) let string = attributed.string ```
translations.```swift\nprotocol HTMLTagParser {\n:
```swift
protocol HTMLTagParser {
    static var tag: String { get } // Declare the Tag Name to parse, e.g. a
    var storedHTMLAttributes: [String: String]? { get set } // Parsed attributes will be stored here, e.g. href, style
    var style: AttributedStringStyle? { get } // The style this Tag wants to apply
    
    func render(attributedString: inout NSMutableAttributedString) // Implement the logic to render HTML to attributedString
}
```
translations.不支援 Image Tag、Table Tag…等較複雜 TAG\n: Does not support complex tags such as Image Tag, Table Tag, etc.
translations.亦有可能是操作的地方不在 Main Thread.\n\n: It is also possible that the operation is not performed on the Main Thread.
translations.使用 Foundation XML Parser 去處理 String，實現 `: Use Foundation XML Parser to process String and implement `XMLParserDelegate`. Use `currentString` to store the String. Since the String can be split into multiple parts, `foundCharacters` may be called repeatedly. In `didStartElement` and `didEndElement`, when the string starts or ends, save the current result and clear `currentString`.
translations.使用 NSAttributedString Render HTML 然後再取 s: Using NSAttributedString to render HTML and then extracting the string will give you a clean String.
translations.使用 XMLParser 自行實現，同 Strip 原理，我們可以多加上剖析到什: Using XMLParser to implement it ourselves, following the same principle as Strip, we can add corresponding rendering methods based on which Tag is parsed.
translations.個人認為單純要 Strip HTML **Option 2. 是比較好的方法**: I personally think that simply stripping HTML **Option 2. is a better approach**. I'm introducing this method because rendering HTML uses the same principle, so let's start with this as a simple example :)
The advantage is achieving complexity; if the HTML is non-compliant, XMLParser will fail, e.g. `
` forgot to write as `
`.
translations.優點是會連帶轉換 HTML Entity to 實際字元 e.g. `&#103: The advantage is that it also converts HTML Entities to actual characters, e.g. `g -> g`
translations.再往上找問題，多半是原始需求無法確定、不能確定 App 需要支援哪些規格、為了求: Looking further up, the issue mostly stems from unclear original requirements and uncertainty about which specifications the app needs to support. To speed up development, HTML was directly used as the interface between the app and the web.
translations.再次提醒， **如果你的 App 是全新的或有機會直接全改成 Markdown: A reminder again, **if your app is new or can be fully switched to Markdown format, it is recommended to use that approach, as writing your own renderer is too complex and will not perform better than Markdown**.
translations.即使你是 iOS &lt; 15 不支援原生 Markdown，還是可以在 Gi: Even if you are using iOS < 15, which does not support native Markdown, you can still find [an expert-made Markdown Parser solution](https://github.com/chockenberry/MarkdownAttributedString){:target="_blank"} on Github.
translations.參考 [SwiftRichString](https://github.com/: Referencing the approach of [SwiftRichString](https://github.com/malcommac/SwiftRichString){:target="_blank"}, use Foundation's **[XMLParser](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/foundation/xmlparser){:target="_blank"}** to parse HTML as XML and implement your own HTML Parser & Strip functionality.
translations.另外有發現 iOS 12、iOS 13 也有零星閃退數，所以此問題應該已存在許久: It was also found that iOS 12 and iOS 13 have occasional crashes, so this issue has likely existed for a long time. However, the crash rate was nearly 100% in the early versions of iOS 15.
translations.可與 Markdown 組合加上支援文字渲染，或參考 Medium 做法：\n\: Can be combined with Markdown to add support for text rendering, or refer to Medium's approach:
translations.可與後端共同協調ㄧ個介面：\n\n: Can coordinate an interface together with the backend:
translations.問題主要來自 **App 端被當成 Web 來進行渲染** ，優點是 Web 開: The main issue comes from **treating the App side as Web for rendering**. The advantage is that web development is fast, the same API endpoint can deliver HTML to all clients without distinction, and it allows flexible rendering of any desired content. The downside is that HTML is not a common interface for apps, you can't expect app engineers to understand HTML, **performance is very poor**, it can only run on the main thread, results are unpredictable during development, and supported specifications cannot be confirmed.
translations.問題同本章問題，iOS 15 容易閃退、效能不好、只能在 Main Thread: The same issues as in this chapter: iOS 15 easily crashes, has poor performance, and can only operate on the Main Thread.
translations.在實踐解答之前我們先回歸探究問題本身，個人認為這個問題主因並非來自 Apple，: Before diving into the solution, let's first revisit the root of the problem. I personally believe the issue does not originate from Apple; the official bug is merely the trigger.
translations.在談 HTML Render 之前先談 Strip HTML，還是再提一次前文: Before discussing HTML Render, let's first talk about Strip HTML. As mentioned earlier in the `Why?` section, where the App receives HTML from and what kind of HTML it gets should be clearly specified in the requirements; it should not be that the App "**might**" receive HTML and therefore needs to strip it.
translations.大家可依照自己的規格需求去刪減功能，例如不需支援背景顏色調整，則不需要開出可設定: You can reduce features according to your own specification needs. For example, if background color adjustment is not required, you don't need to provide an option to set the background color.
translations.套句之前主管的名言：這樣太瘋了吧？\n\n: To quote a former boss: "This is just too crazy, right?"
translations.套用 Strip 的邏輯，我們可以幫拆好的架構在其中進行組合從 `element: Applying the logic of Strip, we can combine the parsed structure by identifying the current Tag from `elementName`, then applying the corresponding Tag Parser and the predefined Style.
translations.如要渲染複雜的、無使用上約束的 HTML：請使用 WKWebView\n: For rendering complex HTML without usage constraints: please use WKWebView
translations.宣告 Tag 可供設定的樣式。\n\n: Declare styles available for Tag configuration.
translations.宣告可剖析的 HTML Tag 實體，方便擴充管理。\n\n: Declare parsable HTML Tag entities for easy expansion and management.
translations.實現 Style Attributed Parser 解析 `style=\"c: Implementing Style Attributed Parser to parse `style="color:red;font-size:16px"` but CSS styles have many possible settings, so it is necessary to list the supported range.
translations.已更新做法，不使用 XMLParser，因容錯率為 0 :\n\n: Updated approach: no longer using XMLParser due to zero fault tolerance:
translations.從去年 iOS 15 發佈以來，App 始終被一項 Crash 問題長年霸榜，從: Since the release of iOS 15 last year, the app has been consistently plagued by a crash issue. According to data from the past 90 days (2022/03/11~2022/06/08), it caused over 2.4K crashes, affecting more than 1.4K users.
translations.意思是 `code in text, and link in text, and: The text of `code in text, and link in text, and ZhgChgLi, and bold, and I, only i` means:
translations.支援剖析 `style` Attributed，因 HTML 會在 `style: Support parsing `style` attributes, since HTML explicitly specifies display styles like `style="color:red"`
translations.支援設定 Tag Default Style e.g <a> Tag 套用連結樣: Support setting Tag Default Style e.g. apply link style to <a> Tag
translations.改使用純 Swift 開發，透過 Regex 剖析出 HTML Tag 並經過: Rewrite using pure Swift development, parsing HTML tags with Regex followed by tokenization, analyzing and correcting tag accuracy (fixing missing end tags & misaligned tags), then converting into an abstract syntax tree. Finally, use the Visitor Pattern to map HTML tags to abstract styles, producing the final NSAttributedString result; no parser libraries are used.
translations.既然是 App 要用，更好的做法要以 App 開發方式為出發點，對 App 來說: Since this is for an app, a better approach is to start from the perspective of app development. Adjusting requirements in an app is much more costly than in the web. Effective app development should be based on iterative adjustments with clear specifications. At any time, you need to confirm the supported specs first, and if changes are needed later, schedule time to expand the specs. Avoid making quick changes on the fly to reduce communication overhead and improve work efficiency.
translations.最簡單有效的方式\n: The simplest and most effective way
translations.有規範＆可描述的結構後，App 就能自行使用原生方式渲染，達到效能、使用體驗最佳: With a defined and describable structure, the app can use native rendering methods, achieving optimal performance and user experience.
translations.木已成舟，回歸正題，目前已用 HTML 在渲染 `NSAttributedStr: The die is cast. Returning to the main topic, now that we are rendering `NSAttributedString` with HTML, how can we solve the crashes and performance issues mentioned above?
translations.本文只是概念實現， **並非架構上的 Best Practice** ；如有明確: This article is just a conceptual implementation, **not a best practice in architecture**; if there are clear specifications and usage methods, consider applying some design patterns to achieve better maintainability and scalability.
translations.樣式支援更改文字粗細、大小、底線、行距、字距、背景顏色、字顏色\n: Style support includes changing text weight, size, underline, line spacing, letter spacing, background color, and text color
translations.此問題大量橫空出世時，讓開發團隊想破腦袋；複測 Crash Log 上的點都沒問: When this issue suddenly appeared in large numbers, the development team was baffled; re-testing the points in the Crash Log showed no problems, and it was unclear under what conditions users experienced it. Until one time, by coincidence, I switched to "Low Power Mode" and triggered the problem!! **WTF !!!**
translations.此大量閃退問題從數據上看，官方應該已在 iOS ≥ 15.2 後續的版本修復(或: According to data, the widespread crash issue seems to have been fixed (or its occurrence reduced) by Apple in iOS versions ≥ 15.2, as the data shows a declining trend.
translations.直接使用 Markdown 做為渲染約束：iOS ≥ 15 NSAttribut: Directly use Markdown as rendering constraints: iOS ≥ 15 NSAttributedString can [render text directly using Markdown format](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/foundation/nsattributedstring/3796598-init){:target="_blank"}
translations.確認接口規範 (Markdown/BBCode/…要繼續用 HTML 也行，但要: Confirm interface specifications (Markdown/BBCode/... can continue to use HTML, but it must be constrained, for example only `<b>/<i>/<a>/<u>`, and the program must **explicitly inform** developers)
translations.經過一番搜索發現網路上有許多相同案例，也從 App Developer Foru: After some searching, I found many similar cases online and located the earliest related [crash issue question](https://developer.apple.com/forums/thread/115405){:target="_blank"} on the App Developer Forums, along with an official response:
translations.補充效能部分，實測直接使用 `NSAttributedString Docume: Additional performance note: Testing shows that using `NSAttributedString DocumentType.html` directly is 5 to 20 times slower than a custom rendering implementation.
translations.這是已知的 iOS Foundation Bug：自 iOS 12 就已存在\n: This is a known iOS Foundation bug: it has existed since iOS 12.
translations.這樣我們就完成了透過 XMLParser 自行實現 HTML Render 功能: This completes our implementation of HTML rendering using XMLParser, while maintaining extensibility and specifications. You can manage the supported string rendering types in the app directly from the code.
translations.重新使用其他方式開發了 *「 [**ZMarkupParser HTML Str: Rebuilt using a different approach: *"[**ZMarkupParser HTML String to NSAttributedString Tool**](../a5643de271e4/)"*. For technical details and the development story, please visit "[The Story of Manually Building an HTML Parser](../2724f02f6e7/)".
